markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align Enable's content team with GrowthX on its new blog partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Initial Focus:** GrowthX will produce \~5 SEO-driven blog posts/week for top/mid-funnel topics during an 8-week calibration sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [**Future Goal:** Post-sprint, the partnership will expand to gated assets (guides, white papers) to fill mid-funnel content gaps and support campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Critical Oversight:** All content requires Enable's review for technical accuracy, brand alignment, and legal/compliance clearance, especially for security topics.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Brand Alignment:** GrowthX will use Enable's AI style guides and a new brand asset package to ensure consistency with the evolving brand identity.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Scope & Goals

  - [**GrowthX's Role:** Produce \~5 blog posts/week after an 8-week calibration sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [**Primary Goal:** Drive SEO and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO/AEO) by capturing search intent for top/mid-funnel topics (e.g., "ransomware recovery playbook").](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
  - [**Future Scope:** Post-sprint, the partnership will expand to gated assets (guides, white papers).](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Fill mid-funnel content gaps and support specific campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
      - [**Process:** Requires closer collaboration with Enable's campaigns and creative teams.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

### Content Strategy & Planning

  - [**Topic Selection:**](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Keyword research to capture audience intent.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
      - [**Enable:** Strategic planning based on campaigns, thought leadership, and events.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [**Alignment:** Post-sprint, the teams will align on a shared content calendar to ensure SEO-driven content supports Enable's strategic goals.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [**Repurposing:** GrowthX will refresh old content but will not optimize Enable's in-progress pieces, which will be handled internally.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)

### Review & Approval Process

  - [**Workflow:** GrowthX → Drafts via email → Pete Roythorne (Enable) → Review & Feedback → Final version → Pete publishes.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Technical Review:** A broader team review for technical accuracy is required, especially during calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Legal/Compliance Review:** Required for claims, security trends, or compliance topics.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
  - [**Bylines:** Specific bylines are preferred over a generic "Enable" banner to avoid generic content.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [**Threat Intel Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
      - [**Context:** Enable's new Threat and Tell team will produce rapid-response content on current threats.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
      - [**Oversight:** GrowthX content on security trends requires extra oversight to align with Enable's messaging and avoid sensitive topics (e.g., nation-state actors).](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)

### Brand & Creative Alignment

  - [**Writing Guidelines:** GrowthX will use Enable's AI style guides, which are the most comprehensive resource.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [**Brand Evolution:** Enable's brand identity is evolving, requiring close alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [**Creative Assets:**](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [**Blog Headers:** GrowthX will generate AI images based on existing blog styles.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [**Gated Assets:** Requires hand-created designs and closer collaboration with Jeff Baxter.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [**Action:** Jeff Baxter will provide a brand asset package to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Pete Roythorne:** Liaise with Jeff Baxter to provide GrowthX with a brand asset package.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
      - [Incorporate Enable's AI style guides into its writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [Begin producing blog content for the 8-week calibration sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [**Enable Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [Provide feedback on initial content drafts to ensure technical accuracy and brand alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [Prepare to align on a shared content calendar with GrowthX post-sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/CqGdTYKEd9nUxpP3tbaR8f7ZghQJP3Wv?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
